title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: November 30, 2023
summary: November 30 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , but at a nearly equal rate of 2.51% (from last week’s growth rate of 2.54%), from the level on 11/23/2023 of 10.151 M km 2 to 10.412 M km 2 for this week. title: How Amazing Arctic Animals Survive An Alaskan Winter
summary: While fall is evident just about everywhere in the lower 48, winter is already moving into Alaska. In honor of the season, please meet a few of the Arctic’s most incredible animals – creatures who endure extreme, dynamic conditions in their own extraordinary way. These truly incredible species highlight what we stand to lose if we fail to preserve our unique Arctic landscapes for generations to come. The Arctic Ground Squirrel and Its Supercool Slumber With winter already creeping across the landscape in Alaska, the Arctic ground squirrels are headed more than a meter below the tundra for their annual hibernation. It’s not uncommon for small rodents to hibernate and turn the dial d...

title: This Holiday Season, BuyAlaska
summary: Alaska is home to a unique tapestry of small businesses that contribute to the state’s economy and character.
